mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO realtime_candidate_score_result ( trade_date, stock_code, short_name, price_1430, final_score, rank_no, confidence_level, valid_flag, strategy_version, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.stockCode}, #{item.shortName}, #{item.price1430}, #{item.finalScore}, #{item.rankNo}, #{item.confidenceLevel}, #{item.validFlag}, #{item.strategyVersion}, #{item.createdAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE short_name = VALUES(short_name), price_1430 = VALUES(price_1430), final_score = VALUES(final_score), rank_no = VALUES(rank_no), confidence_level = VALUES(confidence_level), valid_flag = VALUES(valid_flag), created_at = VALUES(created_at)
